sources.name: Current Provincial Electoral Districts of British Columbia
sources.provider: Province of British Columbia (DataBC / BC Geographic Warehouse)

sources.name: Legislative Assembly of British Columbia representatives (OpenNorth Represent API)
sources.license: See OpenNorth and source_url on each representative

sources.name: Executive Council and Parliamentary Secretaries of B.C.

notes: Riding boundaries are joined to MLAs by normalized riding name. Minister and parliamentary secretary titles are scraped from the cabinet page and matched to MLAs by name. Update OPENNORTH_TO_ARCGIS_RIDING_KEY if riding names diverge.
